title: Blogstify
description: Serverless blog platform built on Next.js 16 and Convex. Uses WebSocket-based reactive queries for real-time comment propagation, a heartbeat-based presence API to track live viewers, and Next.js Server Actions with Zod + React Hook Form for type-safe authenticated image uploads to Convex Storage.

title: Vanish
description: Ephemeral chat app with zero persistence. Built a pub/sub messaging layer with Upstash Realtime achieving sub-100ms delivery, replacing REST polling. Rooms and all messages auto-purge via Redis TTL after 10 minutes. Type-safe API endpoints built with Elysia.js and Zod, with Eden for end-to-end type inference across the Next.js App Router frontend.

title: Resume.gg
description: AI-powered resume analyzer using Puter.js and Claude 3 Sonnet. Serverless architecture handles PDF parsing via pdfjs-dist, file storage, and auth without any backend infra. Multi-step upload flow managed with Zustand, delivering ATS feedback and resume scoring in under 30 seconds.

title: LocatoR
description: Real-time location tracking app using Node.js, Express, Socket.IO, and Leaflet.js. Built to understand WebSocket lifecycle, event-driven server architecture, and map rendering on the client.
